_publications._publicationTitle: Integrative Analysis Identifies Candidate Tumor Microenvironment and Intracellular Signaling Pathways that Define Tumor Heterogeneity in NF1.

_contextSnippet: This analysis quantified the expression of 962 latent variables (LVs) in all 77 samples using their gene expression data... within-cluster distances were significantly reduced (Figure S3, p-value = 2.1 × 10^-182, Wilcoxon test)
details: Successfully quantified expression of 962 latent variables (LVs) in all 77 samples using gene expression data and reduced batch effects with significantly reduced within-cluster distances (p-value = 2.1 × 10^-182)
